title: Cat coughing care guide
text: Coughing in cats can have multiple causes. Open-mouth breathing, labored breathing, collapse, or abnormal gum color should be treated as warning signs.

title: Dog vomiting care guide
text: Repeated vomiting, blood in vomit, severe lethargy, abdominal pain, or suspected toxin exposure are reasons to seek prompt veterinary guidance.

title: Cat urinary care guide
text: A cat that cannot urinate or is repeatedly straining with little or no urine may need urgent veterinary attention, especially male cats.
